definition.name: spectral_idempotent
definition.definition: For unital positive almost-idempotent Phi, P=theta(2Phi-1)=(1/2)(1+sgn(S)) with S=2Phi-1, sgn(S)=SR, R=(S^2)^{-1/2} via the binomial series (convergent since ||S^2-1||=4||Phi^2-Phi||<=4eta<1 for eta<1/4). The spectral idempotent of Phi for the cluster near 1. (def-spectral-idempotent)
